title: Pale Gardening
description: Improves the pale garden by adding fog and removing other hostile mobs.
body:
This pack simply removes hostile and passive mob spawning from the pale garden, to improve ambience and help the biome fit the eerie mood better. In addition, it also adds some subtle fog particles, which I thought made it slightly harder to see long distances, improving immersion.

I'm planning on adjusting the tree shape in 1.1, with some other features hopefully coming soon.
